feat.name: Parthenogenic Hatchling
feat.text:
You were hatched from an unfertilized egg during hard times for your people, and are a biological copy of your mother. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against diseases. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a disease, you get a critical success instead. If you have a different ability that would improve the save in this way (such as the battle hardened fighter class feature), if you roll a critical failure on the save you get a failure instead.  
  
 You take damage only every 2 hours from thirst and every 2 days from starvation, rather than every hour and every day.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.

feat.special: You can select this feat only at 1st level.

links.name: rather than every hour and every day
links.alt: rather than every hour and every day
